name: Pizza Tuna Melt
recipeIngredient: 1 can Solid white tuna in oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Place four pitas on a large baking sheet.
3. Drizzle half a teaspoon of olive oil over each pita.
4. Cover with one quarter of the tuna in oil.
5. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over each bread.
6. Put a tomato slice on each pita.
7. Sprinkle half a teaspoon of olive oil and one teaspoon of basil on each pita.
8. Season with pepper to taste.
9. Bake for about 10 minutes, until the cheese is bubbly.
10. Let cool for several minutes before serving.
